description: CompositionBlue jeans made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex with heavy washed and faded look, has two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, brand patch appliqué d on the waistband at the back, torn look with a metal zip and button closureFitHigh waist, slim fitWash careWash inside out using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsTake edgy dressing to the next level in these distressed blue jeans from spykar. The high waisted jeans in blue are perfect for casual outings with friends. Team this pair with a grunge tee, funky jewellery and leather boots for a great rocker look.Model statisticsThe product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8& rdquo and waist 28"
